name: official-overlay-full-4000
details: Full 4000 QA inference with use_overlay=True completed; overall MEAN 0.207500; pre-evaluation SCORE 0.372647.

name: raw-vs-overlay-full
details: Overlay improved overall MEAN by 0.013250 and pre-evaluation SCORE by 0.008564; temporal_grounding improved from 0.007741 to 0.033822 but remained weak.

name: lora-sft-method-stage
details: Created LoRA-SFT training plan; emphasized data-split verification, leakage prevention, and Qwen3-VL-4B parameter-efficient supervised adaptation.

name: segment-train-audit-script
details: Added scripts/audit_and_split_segment_train.py to summarize official train/test distributions and create a deterministic 90/10 internal train/val split from official TRAIN only.

name: segment-trainval-split
details: Ran audit_and_split_segment_train.py on remote; official train 8000, official test 4000, internal train 7198, internal val 802, seed 20260707.

name: lora-sft-smoke-script
details: Added scripts/train_qwen3vl_lora_sft_smoke.py for tiny Qwen3-VL LoRA-SFT plumbing tests on overlay train/val JSONL manifests.

name: lora-sft-smoke-32
details: Qwen3-VL LoRA-SFT smoke test completed: 32 train samples, 8 val samples, 8 optimizer steps, eval_loss 1.0017873756587505; adapter saved to qwen3vl-4b-smoke-32/adapter-final.

name: qwen3vl-4b-sft-valid5959-e1
details: Full clip-valid Qwen3-VL LoRA-SFT completed: 5959 train, 663 val, 1490 optimizer steps, eval_loss 0.42800752680308324; adapter saved to qwen3vl-4b-sft-valid5959-e1/adapter-final.

name: qwen3vl-4b-sft-valid5959-e1-overlay-test-100
details: Held-out TEST-100 overlay evaluation with full LoRA adapter completed; overall MEAN 0.350000, pre-evaluation SCORE 0.328905, improving over official-overlay-100 overall 0.210000.

name: qwen3vl-4b-sft-valid5959-e1-overlay-test-full
details: Full held-out TEST-4000 overlay evaluation with full LoRA adapter completed; overall MEAN 0.279000, pre-evaluation SCORE 0.402794, improving over official-overlay-full-4000 overall 0.207500.

name: open-vlm-smoke-test3-default
details: Five downloaded open VLM candidates ran on 3 TEST fo_class samples using common multi-frame input and default prompting; all models ran after adapter/dependency fixes. MiniCPM scored 0.333333; other models scored 0.000000.

name: open-vlm-smoke-test3-class-prompt
details: Repeated 3-sample open VLM smoke with class-constrained prompt and answer normalization. LLaVA-OneVision and MedGemma scored 0.333333; MiniCPM dropped to 0.000000; Gemma and InternVL stayed 0.000000. Result motivates larger prompt ablation before TEST-100.

name: open-vlm-test30-default
details: Five open VLM candidates ran on 30 TEST samples with default prompt. Overall: MedGemma 0.200000, MiniCPM 0.166667, LLaVA 0.166667, InternVL 0.100000, Gemma 0.066667.

name: open-vlm-test30-class-prompt
details: Five open VLM candidates ran on the same 30 TEST samples with class-constrained prompt and answer normalization. Overall: LLaVA 0.366667, MedGemma 0.366667, MiniCPM 0.233333, InternVL 0.166667, Gemma 0.100000. Class prompt improves overall for every model on this subset.

name: open-vlm-test100-class-prompt-selected
details: Selected open VLM candidates ran on 100 TEST samples with class-constrained prompt and answer normalization. Overall: MedGemma 0.270000, LLaVA 0.260000, MiniCPM 0.150000, InternVL 0.150000. MedGemma and LLaVA outperform official-overlay-100 overall 0.210000 but remain below Qwen3-VL LoRA TEST-100 overall 0.350000.

name: open-vlm-test100-frame-ablation
details: LLaVA-OneVision and MedGemma ran TEST-100 with 8-frame input under the same class-constrained prompt. LLaVA overall changed 0.260000->0.240000; MedGemma overall changed 0.270000->0.290000 and temporal_grounding improved 0.021739->0.130435.

name: open-vlm-medgemma-8frames-full-4000
details: MedGemma-4B prompt-only full TEST-4000 baseline completed with 8 frames, class-constrained prompt, and answer normalization. Overall MEAN 0.188250, pre-evaluation SCORE 0.281741, processed 4000, failures 0. It underperforms Qwen overlay full overall 0.207500 but provides the selected MedGemma pre-training baseline.

name: open-vlm-llava-onevision-4frames-full-4000
details: LLaVA-OneVision prompt-only full TEST-4000 baseline completed with 4 frames, class-constrained prompt, and answer normalization. Overall MEAN 0.155500, pre-evaluation SCORE 0.249757, processed 4000, failures 0. It underperforms MedGemma overall 0.188250 but is stronger on fo_class 0.230758 and object_identification 0.279323.
